name: Resource Investment Flow-Through Shares
description: Complete Julian Blackwood's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. His tax documents (T4, T101, and investment loan interest letter) are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\blackwood\scenario.txt. You must ensure all slips and deductions are entered, including the T4 employment income, the T101 Statement of Resource Expenses, the related Canadian Exploration Expense (CEE) deduction on Form T1229, the Critical Mineral Exploration Tax Credit on Form T2038(IND), the Ontario Flow-Through Share Tax Credit, and the investment loan interest as a carrying charge on Schedule 4. Save the completed return as 'julian_blackwood.24t'
